рқ— рқ—”рқ—ңрқ—ҡрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—§ | Gathering open-source intelligence (OSINT) on individuals by collecting information from various online platforms using only a username.  рҹ”Ҙ Super Hot!

в—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Ү

рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: Gathering open-source intelligence (OSINT) on individuals by collecting information from various online platforms using only a username.
рҹ“… Created: Jun 2020 вҖў Updated: May 2026

в—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Ү

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… Supports 3,000+ sites with filtering by tags (categories, countries)
вң… Embeddable in Python projects for programmatic use
вң… Extracts all available information from profile pages and site APIs
вң… Performs recursive search using discovered usernames and IDs
вң… Detects and partially bypasses blocks, censorship, and CAPTCHA
вң… Fetches an auto-updated site database
вң… Works with Tor and I2P websites
вң… Includes a web interface for browsing results as a graph
вң… Optional AI analysis mode for investigation summaries


в—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Ү

рҹ“Ҡ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ұ

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 27.9K рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 2K рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 48 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

в—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Ү

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Maigret is a Python-based tool designed to collect extensive information about a person solely by their username. It scans over 3,000 websites, extracting available data from profiles and APIs, and can perform recursive searches for a comprehensive digital dossier.

в—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Үв—Ү

рҹ”— рқ—ҹрқ—ңрқ—Ўрқ—һрқ—Ұ
вҖў рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝ: https://github.com/soxoj/maigret

вң… Focus on curated examples for quality and demonstration

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

This repository provides a curated gallery of prompts for OpenAI's GPT Image 2, serving as a prompt library and an agentic skill. It also includes a Command Line Interface (CLI) for image generation and editing, designed for use with skill-capable agent runtimes.

рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: To provide a conversational AI companion that exhibits complex, human-like behaviors and states, offering a more realistic and engaging interaction than traditional chatbots.
рҹ“… Created: May 2026 вҖў Updated: May 2026

в–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Ә

вң… Human-like behavior simulation (sleep, mood, schedule, memory, relationships, conflicts)
вң… Anti-AI prompt to remove ChatGPT-like responses
вң… Userbot mode via MTProto for real-time interaction (reactions, typing, replies)
вң… Character with internal state, not just a response bot
вң… Cross-platform installation via curl script (Linux, macOS, WSL) with Docker or local Node.js
вң… Native desktop client for Windows using Rust (iced)
вң… Docker support for server environments with headless operation

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 248 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 33 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 11 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

в–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Ә

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Girl-Agent is a TypeScript-based AI character designed to simulate human-like conversational behavior, including sleep, mood, scheduling, memory, and relationship dynamics. It aims to avoid typical AI chatbot patterns by implementing an anti-AI prompt and operating as a character with a distinct state, rather than a simple response generator.

CC Switch is a cross-platform desktop application designed to manage and integrate various AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent. It serves as an all-in-one interface for interacting with these different AI models, simplifying provider management and offering WSL support.

This repository provides a foundational "harness" for building AI agents, emphasizing that true agency stems from the underlying AI model rather than code orchestration. It serves as an educational tool to teach developers how to construct the necessary infrastructure around an AI model to create a functional agent product.

DeerFlow is an open-source super agent harness designed for long-horizon tasks. It orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxes, powered by extensible skills, to research, code, and create complex outputs over extended periods.
